title: BayonHub

screenshots.caption: Listing detail page showcasing rich product information and seller actions.
Seller profile highlighting trust indicators and active listings.
Upgrade flow for Plus monetization tiers.

problem: Cambodia has no credible modern classifieds platform. Existing options are fragmented, low-trust, and not designed for Khmer-speaking users.
constraints: Solo execution with no team or funding
Khmer-language market with unique trust dynamics
myRole: I owned everything from product architecture to frontend, backend, DevOps, UX decisions, and monetization structure as the solo Founder and Product Engineer.
solution: Built a connected product foundation prioritizing search, listing flows, account management, trust indicators, and messaging before any surface polish.
tradeoffs: Chose believable system coherence over flashy isolated features.
Chose phased foundations over pretending to have a finished product early.
results: Delivered a full buyer-to-seller flow live in production.
Engineered a trust system incorporating phone and seller verification.
Implemented a tiered Plus monetization structure.
Established an SEO-canonical architecture for listings.
Built and connected 10+ major product areas.
